name: Chicken Kiev- Country Style
recipeIngredient: 6 Chicken breast halves, skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Melt butter.
3. Combine bread crumbs, cheese, oregano, basil, and garlic salt in a bowl.
4. Dip chicken breasts in melted butter, then coat with crumb mixture and lay them in an 8x11 baking dish.
5. Refrigerate any leftovers.
6. Bake for 40 minutes or until fork tender.
7. Meanwhile, add wine, onion, and parsley to the reserved melted butter.
8. When the chicken is golden brown, pour the butter-wine sauce over the chicken.
9. Continue baking for 3 to 5 minutes to warm the sauce.
10. Serve with wild rice and a green salad.
